lines.text: This is noban. CS2 skin arbitrage with guardrails.
It finds the spread. You keep the profit. The guardrails keep you honest.
The trading desk scans nine venues live, ranks every opportunity by net dollars, and books each simulated trade to the ledger.
Hard spend caps and a kill switch, enforced in the backend.
Cost basis, realized gains, and a tax worksheet your accountant can read.
Simulate free at noban dot gg.
